recommendations.title: Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt: Kimmy vs. the Reverend
recommendations.overview: It's an interactive Kimmy special! Kimmy's getting married, but first she has to foil the Reverend's evil plot. It's your move: What should she do next?

recommendations.title: Jim & Andy: The Great Beyond
recommendations.overview: Offbeat documentarian Chris Smith provides a behind-the-scenes look at how Jim Carrey adopted the persona of idiosyncratic comedian Andy Kaufman on the set of Man on the Moon.

recommendations.title: Man on the Moon
recommendations.overview: The story of the life and career of eccentric avant-garde comedian, Andy Kaufman.

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: Bill Burr: Live at Red Rocks
recommendations.overview: Comedian Bill Burr sounds off on cancel culture, feminism, getting bad reviews from his wife and a life-changing epiphany during a fiery stand-up set.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: New in Town
recommendations.overview: Stand-up comedian John Mulaney tackles such red-hot topics as quicksand, Motown singers and an elderly man he once met in a bathroom.

recommendations.title: The Geographer Drank His Globe Away
recommendations.overview: Victor Sluzhkin signs on as a teacher of geography in a secondary school in his native Perm (in the Urals) and gets lost in a haze of hard vodka, desperate love for a nymphet-like student and the stress of educating teenagers. Geographer, as the stud

recommendations.title: Franco Escamilla: por la anécdota
recommendations.overview: Mexican stand-up comedian Franco Escamilla draws his jokes from real-life experiences -- and he's willing to do anything for new material. He's not afraid to make generalizations about how men bathe. But he is scared to talk to strangers. Especially

recommendations.title: Kumbalangi Nights
recommendations.overview: Four brothers living in the fishing hamlet of Kumbalangi share a love-hate relationship with each other. Their relationship progresses when Saji, Boney and Franky decide to help Bobby stand by his love.

recommendations.title: The Muppet Movie
recommendations.overview: The Muppets gather to watch their newly-finished big-budget rich-and-famous feature film: a talent agent persuades Kermit the Frog to leave the swamp to pursue a career in Hollywood. On his way there, he meets a bear, a pig, a whatever (his future mu
